'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 31''', also styled as '''''Star Wars'' Magazine 31''',  was the 31st issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]''.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*[[Prequel Update]]
*New Hopes
*[[Jawa's Corner]]
*The Cantina
*[[Star Wars Q&A|''Star Wars'' Q&A]]
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]

===Features===
*"[[Designing the Worlds of Episode II: Gavin Bocquet]]"
*"[[Casting Director Robin Gurland]]" {{C|from [[Star Wars Insider 52|''Star Wars Insider'' 52]]}}
*[[In the Star Wars Universe|In the ''Star Wars'' Universe]] — [[Jerome Blake]] {{C|from ''Star Wars Insider'' 48}}
*"Out of This World: ''Star Wars'' Holiday Destinations!"
